summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Invite Link feature. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working for admin invite management, join flow, and non-admin restrictions.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/societies/{society_id}/invites - Admin can create invite with default 7-day expiry
Backend: POST /api/societies/{society_id}/invites - Admin can create invite with custom expiry (1-30 days)
Backend: POST /api/societies/{society_id}/invites - Non-admin rejected (403)
Backend: GET /api/societies/{society_id}/invites - Admin can list active invites
Backend: GET /api/societies/{society_id}/invites - Non-admin rejected (403)
Backend: GET /api/invites/{code} - Public endpoint returns invite details
Backend: GET /api/invites/{code} - Invalid code returns 404
Backend: POST /api/invites/{code}/join - New user can join via invite
Backend: POST /api/invites/{code}/join - Existing user can join via invite
Backend: POST /api/invites/{code}/join - Invalid code returns 404
Backend: DELETE /api/societies/{society_id}/invites/{invite_id} - Admin can revoke invite
Backend: DELETE /api/societies/{society_id}/invites/{invite_id} - Non-admin rejected (403)
Backend: Existing test invite (2exdvkqp) accessible and valid
Backend: 404 returned for non-existent invite operations
Frontend: /join/:code page shows society name, member count, expiration
Frontend: New user can enter name and join via invite link
Frontend: User redirected to dashboard after joining with welcome toast
Frontend: Society page shows Invite Links section for admins only
Frontend: Create Link button opens dialog with expiration options (1, 3, 7, 14, 30 days)
Frontend: Active invites display with share/copy/delete buttons
Frontend: Invite creation copies link to clipboard with success toast
Frontend: Non-admin users cannot see Invite Links section
Frontend: Non-admin users cannot see Create Link button
Frontend: Non-admin users cannot see Settings button
Frontend: Invalid invite code shows 'Invite Not Valid' error page
critical_code_review_comments: Backend invite link endpoints properly enforce admin-only access via admin_id query parameter
Frontend correctly conditionally renders Invite Links section based on user.is_admin
Invite code generation uses 8 lowercase alphanumeric characters for URL-friendly codes
Expiration validation properly returns 410 for expired invites
Join flow handles both new users and existing users without society correctly

test_credentials.admin_user: TestAdmin (society: Test Golf Society, code: NPFUJH)

seed_data_creation: Test players created during pytest run were cleaned up. UI test player TEST_UIJoin_fb1d8b was cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invite link feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST/GET /api/societies/{id}/invites (admin only), GET /api/invites/{code} (public), POST /api/invites/{code}/join (public), DELETE /api/societies/{id}/invites/{invite_id} (admin only). Frontend: /join/:code public page for joining, Society page shows Invite Links card for admins with create/share/copy/delete functionality. Test invite code 2exdvkqp exists for Test Golf Society.
